base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of kraids_lair_zone_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1986 metroid. Kraid's Lair — gray industrial-stone zone. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Kraid's Lair — gray industrial-stone zone; Kraid boss fight at bottom; entered via elevator from Brinstar. Sidehopper-heavy zone
